title: Standout Originals
description: What I would say to be my notable original compositions - the ones with stories, personality, influence, or power points for being pieces I'm particularly fond of for whatever reason.

title: Sonic Premix
description: Tracks composed for or related to the Sonic Premix project, including zone themes, concepts, and whatever else.

title: SRB2 Demo 4 Low Effort
description: The Low Effort collection - quick and scrappy MIDI demakes of Sonic Robo Blast 2 Demo 4 (adjacent) tracks.

title: SRB2 Legacy
description: Arrangements and remixes of classic SRB2 tracks from the older era - Greenflower, Red Volcano, Doomship, Dark City, and more.

title: SRB2 2.2 & Official Releases
description: MIDI arrangements and remixes of tracks from the released versions of Sonic Robo Blast 2, including zone themes, remixes, and the Fortress Clash OLDC entry.

title: SRB2 Early Gang / History Tour
description: Tracks tied to the SRB2 Early Gang / History Tour community server.

title: Classic Sonic The Hedgehog
description: Arrangements from the classic Sonic games and media - Sonic 1, Sonic 2, Sonic & Knuckles, Knuckles' Chaotix, and the Sonic OVA.

title: Scratch Sonic Series
description: Music composed for the Scratch Sonic fangame - title screens, menus, zones, and cutscene tracks.

title: Tally Hall & Related
description: MIDI arrangements of Tally Hall songs, plus related Joe Hawley and Miracle Musical works.

title: A Substantial Sandbox
description: The full collection of original tracks from this old album project of mine which never came to fruition, including all versions and revisions of its songs.

title: Day 25 of Summer - All Versions
description: Every iteration of one of my most revisited original tracks, from its humble beginnings to the 2024 remake.

title: Ruler of Everything - All Versions
description: Because I really liked making midi files of this

title: The Jingles
description: My early jingle experiments - short, kinda boring, and often chaotic little musical snapshots from 2020.

title: Band & Marching Music
description: Concert band, marching, and school-related pieces - from Aztec Fire and Rockero to South Rampart Street Parade.

title: Jazz, Swing & Blues
description: Tracks with a jazzy, bluesy, or swinging feel - originals, arrangements, and everything in between.

title: Sonix Origins 2
description: Music from the Sonix Origins 2 Project

title: O Zone & Variants
description: The O Zone theme and all its relatives - demos, alternate keys, and spin-offs.

title: Poison Plant Zone - All Takes
description: Every version and concept of the Poison Plant Zone theme across its history.

title: Pop & Rock Covers
description: Covers of well-known pop and rock songs - Lady Madonna, Funky Town, Sugar, Speed Me Up, and more.

title: Old Standards & Classics
description: Arrangements of classic pre-rock era songs - from Basin Street Blues to Chattanooga Choo Choo and beyond.

title: Collab Tracks
description: Tracks made collaboratively with Sauceloss and others for various things.

title: Firedance - Both Takes
description: Two attempts at Allen Vizzutti's Firedance - the original incomplete take and the second more refined version.
